index.title: Umusemuzi w'ibikoresho
index.description: Resource Translator opens machine-translated pull requests for your resource files in any repo, in any format — powered by Azure AI Translator, AWS Translate, or Google Cloud Translation.
index.socialTitle: Resource Translator — translate resource files automatically
index.badge: v3.0 — Azure, AWS & Google providers, Node 24, repo config
index.lede: Resource Translator opens machine-translated pull requests for your resource files using Azure, AWS, or Google — one unified action, one provider per run, official SDKs under the hood.
index.workflowTitle: Guhindura akazi ni akazi kabo, ntabwo ari akazi k'ubucuruzi.
index.workflowBody: Drop the action into your existing CI, point it at Azure, AWS, or Google, and let your repo speak every language you target.

config.title: Repo-level config
config.body: Drop a {configPath} file for include globs, glossaries, and Custom Translator categories.

glossary.title: Glossary-aware
glossary.body: Funga amazina y'ibicuruzwa n'amagambo y'ibicuruzwa hamwe na regex y'amagambo meza ifata {cpp}, {dotnet}, n'inshuti.

dryRun.title: Dry-run + soft-fail
dryRun.body: Preview translations without writing files, or surface every error as a warning while you iterate.

sdk.title: Azure, AWS & Google
sdk.body: Hitamo umukinnyi umwe kuri buri run. Buri kimwe kiyoborwa na SDK yayo yemewe ({azureSdk}, {awsSdk}, {googleSdk}) hamwe n'igerageza ryikora kuri {statusCodes} - nta HTTP izunguruka intoki. {esbuild}-bundled, audit-clean.

workflowPreview.body: Three secrets, four lines, and your repo is multilingual on the next push.

cta.title: Ready to localize on autopilot?
cta.body: Urufunguzo rumwe rw'abatanga - Azure, AWS, cyangwa Google - na dosiye imwe y'akazi. Resource Translator ikora ibisigaye.

getting-started.title: Gutangira
getting-started.lede: Ongeraho dosiye y'akazi, uyiyerekeze ku byemezo byawe bya Azure AI Translator, kandi igikorwa kizasuzumisha repo ya dosiye y'ururimi rw'inkomoko no gusohora abavandimwe bahinduwe.

provision.title: Provision an Azure AI Translator resource
provision.body: Create an Azure AI Translator resource in the Azure portal, then store the following as GitHub repository secrets so the workflow can read them:
provision.region: Akarere ka Nyamasheke kagizwe n'Akarere ka Nyamasheke.

resource.title: Commit a source resource file
resource.body: Resource files use the {namingConvention} convention. Urugero {sourceFile} {frFile}, {deFile}, n'ibindi nyuma yo kwiruka.

output.title: Genzura umusaruro
output.body: Iyo akazi karangiye, igikorwa kigaragaza ibicuruzwa bitatu ushobora guhuza mu bisobanuro bya PR: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, na {hasNewTranslations}. It also writes a Markdown summary into the job page via {coreSummary}.

nextSteps.title: Intambwe zikurikira
nextSteps.recipes: See recipes for monorepos, custom glossaries, and Custom Translator categories.

providers.title: Abatanga ubusemuzi
providers.lede: Choose one translation provider per run — Azure AI Translator, AWS Translate, or Google Cloud Translation — behind a single, unified API surface. Umusemuzi yitwara kimwe, atitaye ku muyobozi; gusa impamyabumenyi z'icyiciro cya mbere ziba zitandukanye.
providers.backwardCompatible: Fully backward compatible: {provider} defaults to {azure}, so existing Azure workflows keep working unchanged — no edits required.

selecting.title: Guhitamo umutanga
selecting.body: Shyira {provider} input kuri {azure} (default), {aws}, cyangwa {google}, hanyuma uhe ibyangombwa by'uwo mutangabuhamya. Only one provider is used per action call; the action deterministically delegates to the matching SDK behind a factory.

aws.name: AWS Translate
aws.credentials: OIDC / default chain, or awsAccessKeyId + awsSecretAccessKeyKey; awsRegion

azure.title: Azure AI Translator (default)
azure.body: The default provider. Gutanga ibikoresho bya Azure AI Translator hanyuma unyuze {subscriptionKey}, {endpoint}, kandi ku bushake {region}. Iki ni kimwe n'ibindi bikorwa by'ubucuruzi bimaze gushyirwa mu bikorwa.

aws.title: AWS Translate
aws.body: Uses {sdk}. Hitamo OIDC ukoresheje {configureAwsCredentials} kugira ngo hatagira amabanga y'igihe kirekire abikwa - igikorwa gisoma umuyoboro w'indangamuntu wa AWS SDK. Alternatively, pass {awsAccessKeyId} and {awsSecretAccessKey} explicitly. Buri gihe hakenewe ubufatanye bw'inzego z'ibanze, {awsRegion} cyangwa {awsRegionEnv}'ibidukikije.
aws.keysNote: Kugirango ukoreshe urufunguzo rwa statique aho kuba OIDC, manuka intambwe ya {configureAwsCredentials} hanyuma unyuze {awsAccessKeyId} / {awsSecretAccessKey} (ukoresheje {secrets}) kongeraho {awsRegion}.

google.title: Google Cloud Translation
google.body: Koresha {sdk} (v2). Kwemeza ukoresheje urufunguzo rwa API ({googleApiKey}) cyangwa indangamuntu ya JSON ({googleCredentials}). Tanga kimwe gusa; an optional {googleProjectId} is inferred from the credential when omitted.

mapping.title: Intent-specifier mapping
mapping.body: Provider-specific specifiers are mapped where an equivalent exists. Ibindi byose bigaruka ku makosa akwiriye kugira ngo imyitwarire ihoraho.
mapping.caption: Intent-specifier mapping across providers

locales.title: Locale codes differ per provider
locales.body: Buri sosiyete ikoresha kode zayo z'aho ziherereye (urugero Igishinwa cyoroheje {azureCode} kuri Azure, {awsCode} kuri AWS, na {googleCode} kuri Google). Kode zinyura muri as-is kandi zitwara amazina ya dosiye zisohoka, bityo hitamo agaciro {toLocales} utanga watoranyijwe ashyigikiye.

configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.lede: Express defaults once in the repository config file and let every workflow inherit them. Action inputs always win when both are provided
configuration.intro: Kanda kuri {configPath} ukoresheje uburyo bwo kugenzura niba ukeneye ahantu hadakwiye.

fields.sourceLocale: Reka dusubire ku murongo {sourceLocale} niba utarashyizweho. Ikindi ni uko n'abasemuzi b'ikinyamakuru Izuba Rirashe {fromLocale} ku buryo nta n'umwe ugira icyo abivugaho.
fields.toLocales: Cyangwa umurongo cyangwa umugozi utandukanywa na koma.
fields.includeExclude: Ibipimo bya Glob byasuzumiwe ugereranyije n'inzira zuzuye n'iz'akazi.
fields.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} category — your industry/domain knob (legal, medical, marketing tone, etc.). Sent as {categoryQuery}.
fields.textType: Kudakora {plain}. Use {html} only if your resource values contain real HTML fragments.
fields.profanityAction: How to treat profane terms in translated output.
fields.allowFallback: Set to {false} to fail the translation when your {categoryId} has no deployment for a target locale instead of falling back to the general model.
fields.maxRetries: Maximum retry attempts on transient HTTP responses ({statusCodes}). Kudakora {defaultRetries}. Total HTTP calls per request is {totalCalls}.
fields.retryBackoffMs: Bye Bye Birdie (On Any Backoff Sleep) Kudakora {defaultBackoff}. Umutwe wa {retryAfter} wa Azure wubashywe neza igihe uhari; otherwise jittered exponential backoff is used, capped at this value.
fields.protectPlaceholders: Kudakora {true}. Iyo umaze guhindurwa, ibimenyetso nka {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} na HTML bisimbuzwa ibimenyetso bya sentinel mbere yo guhindurwa hanyuma bigasubizwa nyuma. Disable only when source intentionally contains placeholder-shaped literals.
fields.customPlaceholderPatterns: Ibishushanyo byinyongera bya regex (bidafite delimiters) byongerewe kuri seti ya placeholder ya mbere, urugero {angleToken} kuri syntax ya token isanzwe. Invalid regexes are ignored.
fields.noTranslatePatterns: Ibishushanyo bya Glob bihujwe n'urufunguzo rwo ku rwego rwa parser (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI / restext key). Matching keys are dropped from the request and pass through with their source value preserved.

steps.actionInputs: The action reads explicit inputs from the workflow.
steps.config: It loads the YAML config from {configPath}.
steps.precedence: Kuri buri murima uhuriweho, umusaruro utsinda; otherwise the YAML value is used.
steps.validation: Ibiciro by'ibicuruzwa byashyizweho byemewe. Invalid enums (e.g. {invalidEnum}) cause the action to fail fast with a clear message.

tone.heading: Tone and industry, in plain terms
tone.body: Azure AI Translator v3 API ntabwo ifite tone imwe. Ibice bibiri bihuriye hamwe biguha igice kinini cy'ubugenzuzi bumwe:
tone.industryBody: Use {categoryId} to point at an Azure {customTranslatorLink} category trained on your own corpus — legal, technical, medical, marketing, or anything else. Iyi ni lever ikomeye cyane y'amajwi, ijwi ry'ikirango, n'amagambo.
tone.surfaceBody: Use the {glossaryLink} to lock brand names and product terms verbatim, and use {profanityAction} to scrub profane terms when targeting localization for young audiences.

inputs.title: Inputs & outputs
inputs.lede: Ibicuruzwa byose kandi byemewe muri dosiye ya repo config. Iyo byombi bimaze gushyirwa mu bikorwa, ibikorwa by'indashyikirwa biratsinda.
inputs.configurationIntro: See {configurationLink} for the YAML schema and loading order.

items.sourceLocale: Source locale (e.g. {en}) used to find resource files such as {sourceGlob}. Yoherejwe kandi ku muyobozi nk'uko {fromLocale}.

providerInputs.heading: Provider selection & credentials
providerInputs.caption: Provider selection and per-vendor credentials
providerInputs.intro: Choose one provider per run with {provider}. Tanga gusa ibyangombwa by'umutanga watoranijwe — reba ubuyobozi bw'{providersLink} kugirango ushyireho byuzuye.

items.provider: Igisubizo: {azure} (default), {aws}, cyangwa {google}. Only one provider is used per action call.
items.subscriptionKey: Azure AI Translator subscription key. Birakenewe {azure}. Pass via {secrets}.
items.endpoint: Azure Translator endpoint URL, e.g. {endpointUrl}. Byari bikenewe {azure}.
items.awsAccessKeyId: AWS access key ID. Optional — omit (with {awsSecretAccessKey}) to use the AWS default credential chain / OIDC. Pass via {secrets}.
items.awsSecretAccessKey: Bye Bye Secret Entry Key Agomba gutangwa hamwe n'{awsAccessKeyId}. Pass via {secrets}.
items.awsSessionToken: Optional AWS session token for temporary credentials. Pass via {secrets}.
items.awsRegion: Akarere ka Nyamasheke kahawe inshingano zo gusemura imikoreshereze y'ubutaka (I {regionExample} foto/Umurengezi R) Birakenewe {aws} keretse iyo {awsRegionEnv} yashyizweho mu rwego rwo kubungabunga ibidukikije.
items.googleApiKey: Urufunguzo rwa API ya Google Cloud Tanga iyi CYANGWA {googleCredentials} {google}. Pass via {secrets}.
items.googleCredentials: Google Cloud service-account key as a JSON string. Tanga iyi CYANGWA {googleApiKey} {google}. Pass via {secrets}.
items.googleProjectId: Optional Google Cloud project id. Usually inferred from the service-account credential.

items.region: Translator resource region (omit for global resources).
items.toLocales: Locales to translate to. Yemera JSON array ({jsonArray}) cyangwa ibipimo bitandukanywa na koma.
items.include: Newline-separated glob patterns; gusa inyandiko zihuje n'izo zihindurwa.
items.exclude: Newline-separated glob patterns; Matching files are skipped (applied after include).
items.configPath: Inzira y'umurongo wa YAML config file (ijyanye n'umuzi w'akazi).
items.dryRun: Mu gihe {true}, jya uhindura inyandiko n'inyandiko zinyuranye, ariko ntuzigere wandika.
items.failOnError: When {true}, unexpected errors fail the action; Iyo {false} amakosa aba ari umuburo.

translatorInputs.heading: Azure Translator request inputs
translatorInputs.intro: These map directly into Azure AI Translator v3 query parameters and apply to the Azure provider. textType and profanityAction are also mapped to AWS/Google where an equivalent exists (see the providers guide); Ibisigaye ni Azure-only. Buri wese aba ari amahitamo ye; The Translator defaults apply when unset.
translatorInputs.caption: Azure Translator request inputs

items.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} category — the industry/domain/tone knob. Bye Bye {categoryQuery}.
items.textType: {plain} cyangwa {html}. Use {html} only when your resource values are real HTML fragments.
items.profanityAction: {noAction}, {marked}, cyangwa {deleted}. Genzura uburyo amagambo y'urukozasoni akoreshwa mu buhinduzi.
items.allowFallback: Iyo {false}, umusemuzi asubiza ikosa aho gusubira muri sisitemu rusange niba {categoryId} yawe idafite aho igenewe.

resilienceInputs.heading: Resilience & placeholder protection
resilienceInputs.intro: These inputs control how the action behaves when Translator throttles your request and how it shields placeholder tokens like {mustache} or {indexZero} from being mangled during translation.
resilienceInputs.caption: Resilience and placeholder protection inputs

items.maxRetries: Maximum retry attempts on transient HTTP responses ({statusCodes}). Umubare w'abahamagara kuri buri busabe ni {totalCalls}.
items.retryBackoffMs: Cap (in milliseconds) on any single backoff sleep. The action honors Azure's {retryAfter} response header exactly when present; otherwise it uses jittered exponential backoff capped at this value.
items.protectPlaceholders: When {true} (default), placeholders such as {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} and HTML entities are replaced with sentinel tokens before translation and restored afterward. Disable only when your source intentionally contains literal placeholder-shaped text that should be translated.
items.customPlaceholderPatterns: Newline-separated regexes (without delimiters) added to the default placeholder set, e.g. {angleToken} for custom token syntax.
items.noTranslatePatterns: Newline-separated glob patterns matched against parser-level keys (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI / restext key). Imfunguzo zihuza zikurwa ku busabe bw'Umusemuzi hanyuma zinyura hamwe n'agaciro k'inkomoko yazo.

items.summaryDetails: Markdown summary suitable for a PR body or job summary.
items.hasNewTranslations: {trueString} igihe hasohotse ubuhinduzi bushya bumwe cyangwa bwinshi.

formats.title: Imiterere ya dosiye
formats.lede: Six round-trippable resource formats. The action reads each source-locale file, translates the values, and writes a sibling per target locale.

resx.blurb: XML-based .NET resource files. Translates the inner text of each {dataValue} node, keeping comments and metadata.

xliff.blurb: OASIS XLIFF 2.0 documents. Translates each {source} and writes the result into the matching {target}, setting {trgLang} for the locale.

po.blurb: GNU gettext Portable Object files. Translates each {msgid} / {msgidPlural} into {msgstr} / {msgstrPlural} forms.

json.blurb: Arbitrary JSON files. Nested objects are flattened with the {delimiter} delimiter for translation, then re-nested on output. Imfunguzo z'amadolari ({dottedKey}) zibikwa mu majwi.

ini.blurb: Simple {keyValue} files (Win32-style INI or any flat config). Section headers and comments are preserved.

restext.blurb: Microsoft MUI text resources — flat {keyValue} pairs used as a textual companion to {resx}.

roundTrip.heading: Ubwishingizi bw'ingendo zo kugaruka
roundTrip.body: The test suite verifies byte-for-byte round-tripping for representative fixtures of every format. If a format quirk breaks round-tripping in your codebase, please {issueLink} with a minimal sample.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.lede: Uburyo busanzwe bwo gusemura kohereza: monorepos, glossaries, ibyiciro by'umwihariko, dry runs, no kugenzura amajwi.

pullRequest.heading: Fungura ubusabe bwo gukuramo nyuma ya buri gikorwa

glossary.heading: Glossary for brand names and product terms
glossary.body: Glossary terms are applied {after} translation, so the machine-translated output keeps your preferred branding even when the model swapped it for a synonym.

customCategory.heading: Custom Translator category (industry / domain)
customCategory.body: Itoza icyiciro cya Azure {customTranslatorLink} kuri corpus ifata imvugo n'imvugo y'inganda zawe (amategeko, ubuvuzi, kwamamaza, ubwubatsi bw'imbere, n'ibindi) hanyuma unyuze mu {categoryId}. This is the strongest tone lever Azure offers.

tone.heading: Tone control + strict fallback
tone.body: Combine a Custom Translator {categoryId} with {profanityAction} and {allowFallbackFalse} to enforce a consistent voice and fail the workflow if the chosen category does not have a deployment for one of your target locales.

dryRun.heading: Mbere yo gufungura ikibuga cy'indege cya Bugesera
dryRun.body: The action still emits summary outputs and a step summary, but no files are written. Combine with {failOnErrorFalse} to surface every issue as a warning while you iterate.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.lede: Ibisubizo byihuse by'ibibazo bikunze kwibazwa cyane mu gihe cy'imibonano mpuzabitsina.

azure.heading: How does the action talk to Azure?
azure.body: Binyuze mu {azureSdkLink} SDK ya Microsoft, yashyizweho {corePipelineLink}. Ibyo biguha ibisubizo byikora kuri {statusCodes}, kwandika ubusabe n'ibisubizo by'ibisubizo, no gufata umutwe wo kwemeza ku buntu - ibintu byose byahoze ari guhamagara {axios} intoki. Ibicuruzwa by'ibicuruzwa (ibicuruzwa, ibicuruzwa, ibicuruzwa) ntibihinduka.

tone.heading: Kuki rimwe na rimwe abahinduzi bakunze gusesengura cyangwa gusezerana imbere y'amategeko?
tone.body: Porogaramu ya USU ikora sisitemu yo kugenzura ibaruramari ryububiko bwibicuruzwa. Three knobs help: a {glossaryLink} for hard term overrides, a {customTranslatorLink} for fine-tuned models trained on your tone and vocabulary, and {profanityAction} to scrub or flag profane terms.

duplicateFiles.heading: Ni gute nakwirinda gusemura dosiye imwe inshuro ebyiri?
duplicateFiles.body: Kora igenzura ry'imikoreshereze y'ibicuruzwa by'ibicuruzwa by'{paths} by'umwihariko ibicuruzwa byawe, urugero nk'{sourceGlob}. The action also includes its own per-trigger file filter when {githubToken} is set, narrowing work to files in the latest commit.

offline.heading: Nshobora gukora ibikorwa hanze ya interineti?
offline.body: Not exactly — Azure AI Translator is the runtime brain. Ariko urashobora gukora hamwe na {dryRunTrue} kugirango wemeze parsing na config utiriwe utanga ubusabe bwa HTTP bwo guhindura.

node.heading: What Node version does the action run on?
node.body: v3 runs on the GitHub Actions {nodeRuntime} runtime. JavaScript ihuriweho na Node 20, 22, na 24, nibyo CI igerageza.

dist.heading: Izo {distDir} z'amabuye y'agaciro zituruka he?
dist.body: GitHub JS actions ship their compiled JS in the repository. The {distBuild} workflow rebuilds it after every merge to {mainBranch} if it would drift, and {distCheck} blocks PRs that would land out-of-date output.

formats.heading: Bite se ku bindi bikoresho by'ikoranabuhanga?
formats.body: Uyu munsi: {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, {restext}. {issueLink} if you need another — the parser interface is small (parse → map → apply translations → format) and contributions are welcome.

translations.title: Ubuhinduzi
translations.heroTitle: Bye Bye Birdie in All Languages
translations.lede: This page is translated by Resource Translator itself, on every push to main, into every language Azure AI Translators supports.
translations.statusPending: {translatedCount} currently rendered — {pendingCount} pending the next {workflowName} run.
translations.filterPlaceholder: Shaka ukoresheje ururimi, kode cyangwa izina kavukire...

steps.source: The English source file lives at {messagesPath}.
steps.workflow: Pushes that touch it kick off {workflowLink}, which runs {thisAction} against itself.
steps.fanOut: The action fans out to every Azure AI Translator-supported locale (configured in {configPath}) and writes a sibling {messagesLocaleJson} per target.
steps.pullRequest: Icyifuzo cyo gukuraho cyafunguwe hamwe n'ubuhinduzi bushya. Kuyihuza isubiramo iyi paji hamwe n'amakarita yuzuye.

translations.poweredBy: Powered by Resource Translator and Azure AI Translator.

contributing.title: Gutanga umusanzu
contributing.lede: Bug reports, feature requests, and pull requests are all welcome. Iki gikorwa ni gito bihagije ku buryo umuntu atanga umusanzu we ku nshuro ya mbere.

steps.extension: Add the file extension to {translationFileSchemes} in {finderFile}.
steps.tests: Write round-trip tests for parse → format and applyTranslations.

coverage.heading: Ibipimo by'ubwishingizi
coverage.body: The Jest config enforces minimum coverage. New code must keep the statements + lines threshold above 78% and functions above 90%. Ongeraho ibipimo n'ibipimo hamwe n'impinduka zawe.

docsSite.heading: Urubuga rw'inyandiko
docsSite.body: The {docsDir} folder is an Astro 6 + Tailwind v4 project. Run {npmInstall} there once, then {npmRunDev} for local preview. The {pagesWorkflow} workflow sends docs to GitHub Pages on every merge.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.lede: High-level summary of releases. The canonical, authoritative changelog lives in CHANGELOG.md in the repository.
changelog.fullRecord: Reba {changelogLink} kugira ngo ubone ibisobanuro birambuye.

releases.v302: {label} Translator requests now pin {apiVersion} on the wire for both {translate} and {languages}. The Azure SDK only honors the client-level api-version option when a credential is passed; The action authenticates per request via headers, so that option was silently dropped and requests defaulted to a preview api-version whose {translate} contract rejected the body with HTTP 400 (error code {code}). Gusoza gukosora byatangiye muri 3.0.1.
releases.v301: {label} The {translate} request body is now a bare JSON array of {textItem} items instead of a wrapped {inputs} object, matching the v3.0 REST contract. On its own this didn't restore translations — see 3.0.2.

items.newInputs: New inputs: {include}, {exclude}, {configPath}, {categoryId}, {apiVersion}, {dryRun}, {failOnError}, plus advanced Translator knobs {textType}, {profanityAction}, {profanityMarker}, and {allowFallback}.
items.sourceLocale: Source locale is now also forwarded to Translator as {fromLocale} so short strings are not autodetected.
items.resilience: {label} automatic retry on transient HTTP responses ({statusCodes}) honoring Azure's {retryAfter} header — falls back to jittered exponential backoff when absent. Tunable via {maxRetries} and {retryBackoffMs}. {issue}
items.placeholderProtection: {label} tokens like {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} and HTML entities are wrapped in sentinels before translation and restored afterward, so Translator stops mangling i18next/Mustache/Handlebars/.NET/printf placeholders. Toggle via {protectPlaceholders}; Kwagura {customPlaceholderPatterns}. {issue}
items.perKeyOptOut: {label} new {noTranslatePatterns} input drops matching keys from the Translator request completely (preserves source values for brand names, error codes, etc.). Matches glob patterns against parser-level keys (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI / restext key). {issue}
items.tooling: esbuild bundler, ESLint 9 flat config, Prettier, EditorConfig.
items.docsSite: Astro + Tailwind v4 docs site with view transitions and Expressive Code.
items.docsAccessibility: {label} WCAG 2.1 AA pass. Logo glyphs converted to paths so they no longer fail color-contrast against gradient stops, the floating {backToTop} button uses {inert} while hidden (instead of an {ariaHidden} toggle that left it tabbable), {formatsAstro} sections no longer collide with their auto-generated heading IDs, three locale cards now expose BCP-47-valid {lang} attributes ({nya}, {lug}, {run}), duplicate {documentation} landmark labels are disambiguated between sidebar and footer,  and every data table on {inputs}/{configuration} ships with a screen-reader caption.
items.inlineCode: {label} docs prose {codeElement} now wears the warm/amber theme accent — distinct from the brand→accent palette used for links and headings.
items.automation: Dependabot auto-merge, CodeQL scanning, CI matrix.
